data.title: Tether Transfers 2,000 XAUt to Abraxas Capital Management
data.description: At 01:18, 2,000 XAUt were transferred from Tether to Abraxas Capital Management (Heka Funds). According to ChainCatcher, this transaction highlights the movement of significant assets within the financial sector. The transfer underscores the ongoing activity and strategic asset management by involved parties.

SEC asserts tokenized securities must adhere to existing laws, seeks clear compliance pathway.

data.title: Trump to Announce Federal Reserve Chair Nominee Next Week
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump announced that he will reveal his nominee for the Federal Reserve Chair next week. According to BlockBeats, this announcement comes as anticipation builds around who will lead the central bank. The decision is expected to have significant implications for U.S. monetary policy.

data.title: Kazakhstan to Bolster National Crypto Reserve with Seized Assets
data.description: Kazakhstan's National Bank is set to enhance its national crypto reserve by incorporating cryptocurrencies seized from criminal activities, alongside its existing foreign currency and gold assets. According to NS3.AI, the National Investment Corporation has revealed plans to invest in cryptocurrencies through hedge funds and venture capital, rather than direct ownership. This initiative aligns with the government's ongoing efforts to crack down on illegal crypto exchanges and money laundering, aiming to reduce crypto-related crime and establish Kazakhstan as a regional crypto hub.

data.title: XRP Approaches Key Support Level Amid Price Decline
data.description: XRP, associated with Ripple, has experienced a 5% decline, nearing a crucial support level at $1.80. According to NS3.AI, the resistance zone is identified between $1.87 and $1.90. Traders are closely observing these levels to determine the short-term price trajectory.

data.title: Senate Agriculture Committee advances digital asset bill as Trump’s crypto ties block bipartisan support
data.description:
Broad crypto market structure legislation advanced out of a key Senate committee on Thursday on a party-line vote.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/387698/senate-agriculture-committee-digital-asset-bill-trumps-crypto-ties-block-bipartisan-support?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: SEC chair says 'time is right' for pension funds to include crypto, CFTC head says digital assets set to flourish
data.description:
The Chair of the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has expressed that he believes the current moment is ideal for pension funds to consider incorporating cryptocurrencies into their investment portfolios. Simultaneously, the head of the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) has indicated that the ecosystem surrounding digital assets is poised for significant growth and will likely thrive in the near future. This indicates a growing acceptance and recognition of cryptocurrencies within institutional investment strategies.
source: https://www.coindesk.com/policy/2026/01/29/sec-chair-says-time-is-right-for-pension-funds-to-include-crypto-cftc-head-says-digital-assets-set-to-flourish

data.title: Base Chain Token OTTO Experiences Significant Surge
data.description:
Base chain token OTTO has seen a remarkable increase in value, with its price rising over 730% within a day, according to ChainCatcher. The market capitalization of OTTO has surpassed $11 million, currently standing at approximately $11.19 million.

ChainCatcher advises investors to be cautious due to the significant volatility in token prices.

data.title: Gold investment demand of 2,175t far outstrips central banks’ 863t in 2025
data.description:
Gold investment demand hit 2,175 tonnes in 2025, wiping the floor with the 863 tonnes bought by central banks. That’s not a small gap. That’s central banks getting outpaced by retail and institutional investors nearly 3 to 1. And it wasn’t because they didn’t want gold, it’s because prices kept spiking all year. Every time […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/gold-investment-demand-of-2175t/

data.title: Ethereum Rebound Remains Capped Below Key Resistance
data.description:
Ethereum is attempting to stabilize after a sharp selloff, but the recovery structure remains technically constrained. Price action shows a reaction from major horizontal support, yet broader trend conditions continue to favor sellers while ETH trades below dominant resistance.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/ethereum-rebound-remains-capped-below-key-resistance/
